authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Kern River Reach B
reaches.toDesc: Sequoia National Park boundary near the Kern Canyon Ranger Station

reaches.name: Kern River Reach C
reaches.fromDesc: Downstream of Lake Isabella (Isabella Main Dam)
reaches.toDesc: Downstream through the lower Kern River Valley toward Bakersfield

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(69) — Kern River (Kern and Tulare Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (69) Kern River (Kern and Tulare Cos.). (A) From Lake Isabella upstream to the Johnsondale bridge. All year. 5 trout (B) From Johnsondale bridge upstream to the Sequoia National Park boundary near the Kern Canyon Ranger Station. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout (C) Downstream of Lake Isabella. All year. 5 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Kern River Rainbow Trout | California Department of Fish and Wildlife
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R4 Kern Kern River, Section 1 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take March-June; R4 Kern Kern River, Section 2 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take February-June; R4 Kern Kern River, Section 3 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-September; R4 Kern Kern River, Section 4 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-December; R4 Kern Kern River, Section 5 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-December; R4 Tulare Kern River, Section 6 Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-December

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 255515, "Kern River", Stream, CA, Kern/Tulare Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":255515,"gaz_name":"Kern River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Kern"/"Tulare","objectid_1":950313,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13281202.1768, 4200326.5646 → 35.26774°N, 119.30706°W). Corrects prior file coordinates (-118.4246, 35.7552), which were near Kernville/Lake Isabella (roughly 90 km northeast of the actual GNIS mouth point) and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull; the corrected point is corroborated by the Wikipedia infobox mouth coordinate for the Kern River, 35°16′04″N 119°18′25″W (35.26778°N, 119.30694°W), described as the historic terminus at the Buena Vista Lake Bed.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year from Lake Isabella upstream to the Johnsondale bridge
regulations.verbatimText: From Lake Isabella upstream to the Johnsondale bridge. All year.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 5 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit, Lake Isabella to Johnsondale bridge
Open all year from the Johnsondale bridge upstream to the Sequoia National Park boundary near the Kern Canyon Ranger Station
regulations.verbatimText: From Johnsondale bridge upstream to the Sequoia National Park boundary near the Kern Canyon Ranger Station. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used, Johnsondale bridge to the Sequoia National Park boundary
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 2 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit, Johnsondale bridge to the Sequoia National Park boundary
Open all year downstream of Lake Isabella
regulations.verbatimText: Downstream of Lake Isabella. All year.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 5 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit, downstream of Lake Isabella

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Kern River, Section 1 (Region 4, Kern Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of March-June. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant; the document's own Kern River section numbering is not mapped to this record's reach_a/b/c boundaries.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Kern River, Section 2 (Region 4, Kern Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of February-June.
